title: thelypteris austrophilippina
intro: Thelypteris austrophilippina, also known as the Philippine Shield Fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae. Native to the Philippines, this plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Thelypteris austrophilippina include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of Thelypteris austrophilippina can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water or by using the plant's extracts in ointments and creams, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety for human use.
